nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for translating visa and immigration documents from foreign languages using OCR and LLM-based translation, covering supported document types, OCR methods, and output formatting guidelines.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill reference for Vite build tool patterns covering configuration, plugins, HMR, environment variables, build optimization, SSR, and common pitfalls with annotated code examples.
nodes.languageNotes: 39 sections covering Vite-specific patterns including security caveats around VITE_ prefix and loadEnv traps.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill reference for Vue.js 3 best practices covering component architecture, composables, Pinia state management, Vue Router, template patterns, performance, testing, Nuxt-specific patterns, and Vue 3.5+ new APIs.
nodes.languageNotes: 41 sections covering Vue 3 Composition API patterns, Pinia setup stores, and Vue 3.5+ reactive props destructure.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill reference for Windows desktop end-to-end testing via UI Automation, covering Page Object Model, locator strategies, test isolation tiers (filesystem, Job Object, Windows Sandbox), CI/CD integration, Qt-specific quirks, and screenshot fallback mode.
nodes.languageNotes: 41 sections; notable three-tier isolation model: filesystem isolation, Windows Job Object for process containment, and Windows Sandbox for full-OS CI isolation.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for auditing Claude Code workspace surfaces — inventorying existing agents, skills, commands, hooks, and rules, then benchmarking against official ECC surfaces to identify gaps and produce actionable ECC decisions.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill reference for integrating with the X (Twitter) API, covering OAuth 2.0 and 1.0a authentication, core tweet/timeline/search operations, media upload, rate limits, error handling, and security practices.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty Python package initializer marking src/llm/cli as a Python package with no exports.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Minimal Python package initializer for the src/llm/core package with a single line of content.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty Python package initializer marking the tests directory as a Python package.

nodes.name: agent-instruction-safety.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that scans agent Markdown files to verify they include required prompt-defense baseline instructions and do not contain patterns that could expose agent internals.

nodes.name: agent-yaml-surface.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that validates the agent YAML surface registry matches the actual commands directory, ensuring no undocumented or missing agent commands.

nodes.name: catalog.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test suite for the catalog builder script that verifies correct counting of agents/skills/commands, catalog output formatting, and multi-language README generation using temporary fixture directories.

nodes.name: code-reviewer-false-positive-guard.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that guards against false-positive detection patterns in the code-reviewer agent by validating that known benign patterns do not trigger security warnings.

nodes.name: codex-skill-surface.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that validates the Codex skill surface by parsing YAML frontmatter from skill files and ensuring all required metadata fields are present and consistent.

nodes.name: command-registry.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test suite for the command registry generator that verifies correct extraction of command metadata, generation of registry files, and handling of edge cases using temporary fixture directories.

nodes.name: dynamic-workflow-team-surface.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that validates the dynamic workflow team surface specification by reading the surface definition and checking for required agent roles and handoff patterns.

nodes.name: mle-workflow-coverage.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that validates coverage of the machine learning engineering workflow by parsing simulation scenario tables from skill files and checking for required workflow steps.

nodes.name: no-personal-paths.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that scans repository files for hardcoded personal filesystem paths (e.g., /Users/username) to prevent accidental path leaks in committed code.

nodes.name: scan-supply-chain-iocs.test.js
nodes.summary: CI security test that scans supply chain indicators of compromise (IOCs) — suspicious URLs, package registry anomalies, and dependency tampering patterns — across the repository's hook and script files.

nodes.name: secret-curl-flags.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that detects curl invocations in shell examples that could silently exfiltrate credentials, ensuring all curl examples use safe flag combinations.

nodes.name: supply-chain-advisory-sources.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that validates the supply chain advisory sources configuration, checking that all advisory feed URLs are reachable and return properly structured responses.

nodes.name: supply-chain-watch-workflow.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that validates the supply chain watch GitHub Actions workflow has required job definitions, trigger conditions, and security permissions.

nodes.name: validate-workflow-security.test.js
nodes.summary: CI test that validates GitHub Actions workflow files for security issues including overly permissive permissions, unvalidated input injection, and missing security controls.

nodes.name: validators.test.js
nodes.summary: Comprehensive CI test suite for the validators script covering agent, skill, command, hook, and catalog validation logic across hundreds of test cases using temporary fixture directories.

nodes.name: codex-config.test.js
nodes.summary: Test file that validates the Codex TOML configuration, ensuring required sections exist and key settings match expected values.

nodes.name: writeCatalogFixture
nodes.summary: Builds a full catalog fixture directory tree for testing by composing multiple file writers for English/Chinese readmes, agents, and plugin metadata.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Main test runner for catalog tests that exercises buildCatalog and runCatalogCheck functions across multiple fixture scenarios and asserts output correctness.

nodes.name: writeEnglishReadme
nodes.summary: Writes a multi-section English README fixture file with agent/skill/command/hook/rule count tables for use in catalog tests.

nodes.name: writeZhDocsReadme
nodes.summary: Writes a Chinese-language docs README fixture with agent/skill count tables for testing catalog multi-language support.

nodes.name: extractTopLevelList
nodes.summary: Parses a YAML source string and extracts items from a named top-level list key, used to verify that the agent YAML surface matches filesystem reality.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Main test orchestrator for agent-yaml-surface tests that reads the YAML surface file, scans the commands directory, and asserts parity between registry and filesystem.

nodes.name: parseFrontmatter
nodes.summary: Extracts YAML frontmatter fields from a skill Markdown file, returning a key-value map of metadata properties.

nodes.name: parseQuotedYamlValue
nodes.summary: Strips surrounding quotes from YAML string values when parsing skill frontmatter.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Main test runner for codex skill surface validation that iterates all skill directories, parses frontmatter, and asserts required metadata fields exist.

nodes.name: writeFixture
nodes.summary: Writes a set of command fixture Markdown files to a temporary directory for command registry generator testing.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Main test runner for command registry tests that exercises generateCommandRegistry across fixtures and verifies output format and content.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Main test runner that reads MLE workflow skill files, extracts simulation scenario rows, and validates that required workflow coverage steps are present.

nodes.name: extractSimulationRows
nodes.summary: Extracts table rows from the simulation scenarios section of MLE skill Markdown files.

nodes.name: runValidatorAgainst
nodes.summary: Runs the personal-paths validator against a temporary fixture file and returns the validation result, used to test specific path patterns in isolation.

nodes.name: runValidatorAgainstRealRepo
nodes.summary: Runs the personal-paths validator against the actual repository files to ensure no real personal paths exist in committed code.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test runner that exhaustively tests supply chain IOC scanner detection across dozens of malicious URL patterns, typosquatted package names, and benign allowlisted patterns.

nodes.name: withFixture
nodes.summary: Helper that creates a temporary fixture file, runs a callback with it, then cleans up — used to isolate IOC scanner tests.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Large test runner that validates supply chain advisory source configuration, iterating advisory feeds and asserting structural properties of feed definitions.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Main test runner that scans all GitHub Actions workflow YAML files for security misconfigurations, testing each vulnerability pattern across real and fixture workflows.

nodes.name: runValidator
nodes.summary: Executes the workflow security validator script against a given YAML file and returns parsed results for assertion.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Massive test runner for the validators script covering hundreds of validation scenarios for agents, skills, commands, hooks, catalog entries, and supply chain checks.

nodes.name: runSourceViaTempFile
nodes.summary: Writes source code to a temporary file and executes it via Node.js, capturing exit code and output for validator tests that cannot require() the module directly.

nodes.name: runValidatorWithDir
nodes.summary: Runs the validators script against a single fixture directory and returns structured validation results.

nodes.name: writeCatalogFixture
nodes.summary: Writes a full catalog fixture structure with agents, skills, commands, hooks, and rules to a temporary directory for validator testing.

nodes.name: runCatalogValidator
nodes.summary: Runs catalog-specific validation logic and returns structured results, used by tests to assert catalog integrity rules.

nodes.name: runSkillsValidator
nodes.summary: Runs skills-specific validation logic and returns structured results, used by tests to assert skill frontmatter and content rules.

nodes.name: getTomlSection
nodes.summary: Extracts a named TOML section's content from a raw TOML string for targeted assertion in codex config tests.
